ddls:
CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "original_air_date" TEXT /* Original air date of the episode */,
  "production_code" TEXT /* Production code assigned to the episode */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season number of the episode */,
  "number_in_season" INTEGER /* Episode number within the season */,
  "number_in_series" INTEGER /* Episode number within the entire series */,
  "us_viewers_in_millions" REAL /* Number of US viewers in millions */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views or hits the episode has received */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDb rating of the episode */,
  "imdb_votes" INTEGER /* Number of IMDb votes for the episode */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the episode */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the video of the episode */,
  "plot_summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the episode's plot */,
  "director" TEXT /* The director of the episode */,
  "writers" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of writers for the episode */,
  "guest_stars" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of guest stars in the episode */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* The runtime of the episode in minutes */,
  "air_date_time" TEXT /* The exact air date and time of the episode */,
  "rerun_dates" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of dates when the episode was rerun */,
  "original_language" TEXT /* The original language of the episode */,
  "subtitles_available" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if subtitles are available */,
  "closed_captions" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if closed captions are available */,
  "is_special" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the episode is a special */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "total_episodes" INTEGER /* The total number of episodes in the season */,
  "season_synopsis" TEXT /* A brief summary of the season */,
  "season_director" TEXT /* The main director of the season */,
  "season_writers" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of main writers for the season */,
  "average_viewers" REAL /* The average number of US viewers for the season */,
  "average_imdb_rating" REAL /* The average IMDb rating for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being rated */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDb rating of the episode */,
  "imdb_votes" INTEGER /* Number of IMDb votes for the episode */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* The date when the rating was last updated */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* The source of the rating (e.g., IMDb, Rotten Tomatoes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewership" (
  "viewership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewership entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being viewed */,
  "us_viewers_in_millions" REAL /* Number of US viewers in millions */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views or hits the episode has received */,
  "international_viewers" INTEGER /* The number of international viewers */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* The date when the viewership data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewership_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode associated with the media */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the episode */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the video of the episode */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to a thumbnail image of the episode */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the trailer of the episode */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* The type of media (e.g., image, video, trailer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, researcher, industry professional) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* The date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "favorite_series" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of the user's favorite series */,
  "is_subscriber" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the user is a subscriber */,
  "subscription_tier" TEXT /* The user's subscription tier (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the episode */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the episode was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "device" TEXT /* The device used to access the episode (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location from which the episode was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* The number of likes the comment has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* The number of dislikes the comment has received */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the comment has been flagged for moderation */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* The status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES episode_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_comments_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("id")
)
